summary: When the architect subagent implements plan tasks during validation (indicated by "Verdict: Approved (implemented directly...)" in the issue comment), cherry-pick those commits from `origin/refine/issue-NNN-...` onto the feat branch rather than reimplementing from scratch: `git log --oneline main..origin/refine/<branch>` to find the commits, then `git cherry-pick <hashes>` in chronological order.
